.file-embed.background: rgb(15, 15, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(2, 2, 2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(2, 2, 2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / contain padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6\"></path><polyline points=\"15 3 21 3 21 9\"></polyline><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"14\" x2=\"21\" y2=\"3\"></line></svg>") repeat scroll 0% 0% / contain padding-box border-box
a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)), url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6\"></path><polyline points=\"15 3 21 3 21 9\"></polyline><line x1=\"10\" y1=\"14\" x2=\"21\" y2=\"3\"></line></svg>")
a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

blockquote.background: rgba(187, 154, 247, 0.12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(8, 8, 8) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(8, 8, 8), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(8, 8, 8) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(8, 8, 8) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(rgb(8, 8, 8), color-mix(in srgb, rgb(8, 8, 8) 65%, transparent))
body.--spoiler-pattern:
radial-gradient(circle 1px at 10px 8px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 30px 2px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 50px 12px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 70px 6px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 15px 24px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 38px 28px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 60px 36px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 50%, transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle 1px at 85px 22px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7) 50%, transparent 50%)
body.background: rgb(2, 2, 2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(2, 2, 2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(2, 2, 2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(to right, rgb(255, 117, 127) 30%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 70%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
